Dialog.name: MND_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I remember buying something through[n]the home shopping TV program...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That reminds me of President Tanaka and his[n]unique presentation. I hope he's doing well...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That reminds me, President Tanaka[n]from Tanaka's Amazing Commodities...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There was a scandal surrounding him,[n]but it seems like he's doing well anyway.[n]{f 1 1}
